granularity: Pure deletion at line or sentence granularity (sentences split on '. '/'! '/'? ' after a leading 'Label:' prefix). Sub-sentence unsupported fragments embedded in transcript-supported sentences are RETAINED and enumerated in residual_fragments — excising them would require rewriting, which the pure-deletion scrub prohibits.
